# Process Reliabilism with Implicit Faculties

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 746c6927-1537-45eb-8161-b100f0b7b459
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can someone unknowingly possessing cognitive abilities still have knowledge?](can-someone-unknowingly-possessing-cognitive-abilities-still-have-knowledge-antithesis-3278036a-ea9d-40e8-9527-b1ddd3ab4d4d.md)

## Content

**Knowledge requires true belief generated by reliable processes**, **A belief is knowledge if the cognitive process is reliable**, **The knower does not need to be aware of the reliability**, **The reliability of the process leads to the truth of the belief**
